mnemonics: Lovers Try Positions In Hillary's Greenhouse (L-T-P-I-H-G)
Mother Never Pays Insurance, Guys Hate Ghosts (M-N-P-I-G-H)
Green Guitar Hangs Upward Near Temple Hills (G-G-H-U-N-T-H)
Happy Giraffes Hang Out Near Tall Hills (H-G-H-O-N-T-H)
keyPoints: Layering: Divide data into 7 layers for easier management
TCP/IP Protocol suite: Standard for internet communication
OSI Model: 7-layered model for network communication
Physical Layer: Transmission media used to send data
Guided Media: Uses cables to transmit data (e.g. coaxial cable, twisted pair)
Unguided Media: Wireless signals transmitted without cables (e.g. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth)
